title: Cloud-Based Food Donation System for Waste Reduction & Hunger Relief
description: Designing and prototyping a robust cloud platform for real-time food donation tracking, inventory management, and NGO coordination. Leveraging AWS services to ensure high availability, security, and scalable container deployment.

title: Hybrid Multimodal Plagiarism Detection System
description: Developing an intelligent system that integrates OCR, TF-IDF vectorization, and Sentence-BERT embeddings. Focuses on detecting cross-modal plagiarism in both text documents and diagrams/images.
